module.name: Kavenegar SMS
module.changelog: *1.0.0.9* Fxied error mobile number *1.0.0.8* Service Disabled on config and agi checked *1.0.0.7* Remove manual and fix gui config *1.0.0.6* Add config load on agi, For fixed bug on custom hangup *1.0.0.5* Bug fixed on saved config *1.0.0.4* Add config get mobile number from city number *1.0.0.3* Add content tag,last submit,send after hangup *1.0.0.2* Fixed send *1.0.0.1* SunwaySMS Release *1.0.0.0* Initial Issabel Foundation release
